positive: Pop art comic book style illustration of a friendly astronaut cat floating through a nebula. Bold outlines, primary colors, halftone dot patterns, dynamic composition, reminiscent of Roy Lichtenstein meets Disney. Action pose, joyful expression. --ar 1:1
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, watercolor, soft edges, realism, grayscale
